headline: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks | TechCrunch
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 26 new launches — Ollama, The Verge AI, The Guardian Tech

article_items.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks | TechCrunch
article_items.description: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
article_items.excerpt: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

article_items.what_happened: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
key_points: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
